# Implementation Plan Alpha

## Overview

A plan that uses the heading variant '## Risks & Mitigations' with a
populated table.  G2.no_risks must not fire for this plan.

## Risks & Mitigations

| Risk | Severity | Mitigation |
|------|----------|------------|
| Schedule slip | Medium | Weekly tracking and scope control |
| Key dependency delay | High | Parallel track with fallback vendor |
